stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

abilities.effect:
You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
* **Cantrip** *tanglefoot*
* **1st** protector tree, *shillelagh*
* **2nd** *entangle*, *shape wood*
* **3rd** *tree shape*, *wall of thorns*
* **4th** *barkskin*, *speak with plants*
* **5th** *plant form*, *wall of thorns*
* **6th** *nature's reprisal*, *plant form*
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text:
This staff was created as an example of the personal staves rules.  
  
Moss and winding vines give this gnarled staff of wild wood a vibrant green tinge. You created this staff to aid you in speaking to the plants you met on your adventure and beseeching them to come to your aid.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Plant
traits.text: Vegetable creatures have the plant trait. They are distinct from normal plants. Magical effects with this trait manipulate or conjure plants or plant matter in some way. Effects that manipulate plants have no effect in an area with no plants.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

traits.name: Transmutation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the transmutation school of magic, typically changing something’s form.
